mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, quantity, price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{quantity}, #{price})

INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, quantity, price) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.price})
